patch.value: Add an opt-in --progress flag that derives a per-item progress ratio from pm signals (closed/canceled=100%, in_progress=acceptance-criteria checked ratio or 50% default, open=0%) and renders it: ASCII as a trailing NN% plus partial-fill glyph, Mermaid via native 'done'/percentage tag, HTML as a fill width overlay. Default output (no flag) must remain byte-identical to keep existing tests/golden output intact.
Add % complete (progress) rendering to Gantt bars
